name: mcp:arxiv_local.search_papers
description:
Search for papers on arXiv with advanced filtering and query optimization.

QUERY CONSTRUCTION GUIDELINES:
- Use QUOTED PHRASES for exact matches: "multi-agent systems", "neural networks", "machine learning"
- Combine related concepts with OR: "AI agents" OR "software agents" OR "intelligent agents"  
- Use field-specific searches for precision:
  - ti:"exact title phrase" - search in titles only
  - au:"author name" - search by author
  - abs:"keyword" - search in abstracts only
- Use ANDNOT to exclude unwanted results: "machine learning" ANDNOT "survey"
- For best results, use 2-4 core concepts rather than long keyword lists

ADVANCED SEARCH PATTERNS:
- Field + phrase: ti:"transformer architecture" for papers with exact title phrase
- Multiple fields: au:"Smith" AND ti:"quantum" for author Smith's quantum papers  
- Exclusions: "deep learning" ANDNOT ("survey" OR "review") to exclude survey papers
- Broad + narrow: "artificial intelligence" AND (robotics OR "computer vision")

CATEGORY FILTERING (highly recommended for relevance):
- cs.AI: Artificial Intelligence
- cs.MA: Multi-Agent Systems  
- cs.LG: Machine Learning
- cs.CL: Computation and Language (NLP)
- cs.CV: Computer Vision
- cs.RO: Robotics
- cs.HC: Human-Computer Interaction
- cs.CR: Cryptography and Security
- cs.DB: Databases

EXAMPLES OF EFFECTIVE QUERIES:
- ti:"reinforcement learning" with categories: ["cs.LG", "cs.AI"] - for RL papers by title
- au:"Hinton" AND "deep learning" with categories: ["cs.LG"] - for Hinton's deep learning work
- "multi-agent" ANDNOT "survey" with categories: ["cs.MA"] - exclude survey papers
- abs:"transformer" AND ti:"attention" with categories: ["cs.CL"] - attention papers with transformer abstracts

DATE FILTERING: Use YYYY-MM-DD format for historical research:
- date_to: "2015-12-31" - for foundational/classic work (pre-2016)
- date_from: "2020-01-01" - for recent developments (post-2020)
- Both together for specific time periods

RESULT QUALITY: Results sorted by RELEVANCE (most relevant papers first), not just newest papers.
This ensures you get the most pertinent results regardless of publication date.

TIPS FOR FOUNDATIONAL RESEARCH:
- Use date_to: "2010-12-31" to find classic papers on BDI, SOAR, ACT-R
- Combine with field searches: ti:"BDI" AND abs:"belief desire intention"  
- Try author searches: au:"Rao" AND "BDI" for Anand Rao's foundational BDI work

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query using quoted phrases for exact matches (e.g., '"machine learning" OR "deep learning"') or specific technical terms. Avoid overly broad or generic terms.

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10, max: 50). Use 15-20 for comprehensive searches.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Start date for papers (YYYY-MM-DD format). Use to find recent work, e.g., '2023-01-01' for last 2 years.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: End date for papers (YYYY-MM-DD format). Use with date_from to find historical work, e.g., '2020-12-31' for older research.

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Strongly recommended: arXiv categories to focus search (e.g., ['cs.AI', 'cs.MA'] for agent research, ['cs.LG'] for ML, ['cs.CL'] for NLP, ['cs.CV'] for vision). Greatly improves relevance.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort results by 'relevance' (most relevant first, default) or 'date' (newest first). Use 'relevance' for focused searches, 'date' for recent developments.

parameters.description: If supplied, this endpoint will return a page of results starting after the cursor provided. If not supplied, this endpoint will return the first page of results.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items from the full list desired in the response. Maximum: 100

name: mcp:notion.API-patch-block-children
description: Notion | Append block children

parameters.name: block_id
parameters.description: Identifier for a [block](ref:block). Also accepts a [page](ref:page) ID.

parameters.name: children
parameters.description: Child content to append to a container block as an array of [block objects](ref:block)

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The ID of the existing block that the new block should be appended after.

name: mcp:notion.API-patch-page
description: Notion | Update page properties

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The identifier for the Notion page to be updated.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The property values to update for the page. The keys are the names or IDs of the property and the values are property values. If a page property ID is not included, then it is not changed.

parameters.name: in_trash
parameters.description: Set to true to delete a block. Set to false to restore a block.

parameters.name: icon
parameters.description: A page icon for the page. Supported types are [external file object](https://developers.notion.com/reference/file-object) or [emoji object](https://developers.notion.com/reference/emoji-object).

parameters.name: cover
parameters.description: A cover image for the page. Only [external file objects](https://developers.notion.com/reference/file-object) are supported.

name: mcp:notion.API-post-database-query
description: Notion | Query a database

parameters.name: filter_properties
parameters.description: A list of page property value IDs associated with the database. Use this param to limit the response to a specific page property value or values for pages that meet the `filter` criteria.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: When supplied, limits which pages are returned based on the [filter conditions](ref:post-database-query-filter).

parameters.name: sorts
parameters.description: When supplied, orders the results based on the provided [sort criteria](ref:post-database-query-sort).

parameters.name: start_cursor
parameters.description: When supplied, returns a page of results starting after the cursor provided. If not supplied, this endpoint will return the first page of results.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items from the full list desired in the response. Maximum: 100

name: mcp:notion.API-post-page
description: Notion | Create a page

parameters.name: children
parameters.description: The content to be rendered on the new page, represented as an array of [block objects](https://developers.notion.com/reference/block).

parameters.name: icon
parameters.description: The icon of the new page. Either an [emoji object](https://developers.notion.com/reference/emoji-object) or an [external file object](https://developers.notion.com/reference/file-object)..

parameters.name: cover
parameters.description: The cover image of the new page, represented as a [file object](https://developers.notion.com/reference/file-object).

name: mcp:notion.API-post-search
description: Notion | Search by title

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The text that the API compares page and database titles against.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: A set of criteria, `direction` and `timestamp` keys, that orders the results. The **only** supported timestamp value is `"last_edited_time"`. Supported `direction` values are `"ascending"` and `"descending"`. If `sort` is not provided, then the most recently edited results are returned first.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: A set of criteria, `value` and `property` keys, that limits the results to either only pages or only databases. Possible `value` values are `"page"` or `"database"`. The only supported `property` value is `"object"`.

parameters.name: start_cursor
parameters.description: A `cursor` value returned in a previous response that If supplied, limits the response to results starting after the `cursor`. If not supplied, then the first page of results is returned. Refer to [pagination](https://developers.notion.com/reference/intro#pagination) for more details.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items from the full list to include in the response. Maximum: `100`.

name: mcp:notion.API-retrieve-a-block
description: Notion | Retrieve a block

name: mcp:notion.API-retrieve-a-comment
description: Notion | Retrieve comments

parameters.name: block_id
parameters.description: Identifier for a Notion block or page

parameters.name: start_cursor
parameters.description: If supplied, this endpoint will return a page of results starting after the cursor provided. If not supplied, this endpoint will return the first page of results.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items from the full list desired in the response. Maximum: 100

name: mcp:notion.API-retrieve-a-database
description: Notion | Retrieve a database

parameters.name: database_id
parameters.description: An identifier for the Notion database.

name: mcp:notion.API-retrieve-a-page
description: Notion | Retrieve a page

parameters.name: filter_properties
parameters.description: A list of page property value IDs associated with the page. Use this param to limit the response to a specific page property value or values. To retrieve multiple properties, specify each page property ID. For example: `?filter_properties=iAk8&filter_properties=b7dh`.

name: mcp:notion.API-retrieve-a-page-property
description: Notion | Retrieve a page property item

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: For paginated properties. The max number of property item objects on a page. The default size is 100

name: mcp:notion.API-update-a-block
description: Notion | Update a block

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The [block object `type`](ref:block#block-object-keys) value with the properties to be updated. Currently only `text` (for supported block types) and `checked` (for `to_do` blocks) fields can be updated.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Set to true to archive (delete) a block. Set to false to un-archive (restore) a block.

name: mcp:notion.API-update-a-database
description: Notion | Update a database

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: An array of [rich text objects](https://developers.notion.com/reference/rich-text) that represents the title of the database that is displayed in the Notion UI. If omitted, then the database title remains unchanged.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: An array of [rich text objects](https://developers.notion.com/reference/rich-text) that represents the description of the database that is displayed in the Notion UI. If omitted, then the database description remains unchanged.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: Property schema of database. The keys are the names of properties as they appear in Notion and the values are [property schema objects](https://developers.notion.com/reference/property-schema-object).

name: mcp:word.add_table
description: Add a table to a Word document.

name: mcp:word.apply_table_alternating_rows
description: Apply alternating row colors to a table for better readability.

name: mcp:word.auto_fit_table_columns
description: Set table columns to auto-fit based on content.

name: mcp:word.convert_to_pdf
description: Convert a Word document to PDF format.

name: mcp:word.copy_document
description: Create a copy of a Word document.

name: mcp:word.create_custom_style
description: Create a custom style in the document.

name: mcp:word.create_document
description: Create a new Word document with optional metadata.

name: mcp:word.customize_footnote_style
description: Customize footnote numbering and formatting in a Word document.

name: mcp:word.delete_footnote_from_document
description: Delete a footnote from a Word document.

name: mcp:word.delete_footnote_robust
description: Delete footnote with comprehensive cleanup and orphan removal.

name: mcp:word.delete_paragraph
description: Delete a paragraph from a document.

name: mcp:word.find_text_in_document
description: Find occurrences of specific text in a Word document.

name: mcp:word.format_table
description: Format a table with borders, shading, and structure.

name: mcp:word.format_table_cell_text
description: Format text within a specific table cell.

name: mcp:word.format_text
description: Format a specific range of text within a paragraph.

name: mcp:word.get_all_comments
description: Extract all comments from a Word document.

name: mcp:word.get_comments_by_author
description: Extract comments from a specific author in a Word document.

name: mcp:word.get_comments_for_paragraph
description: Extract comments for a specific paragraph in a Word document.

name: mcp:word.get_document_info
description: Get information about a Word document.

name: mcp:word.get_document_outline
description: Get the structure of a Word document.

name: mcp:word.get_document_text
description: Extract all text from a Word document.

name: mcp:word.get_document_xml
description: Get the raw XML structure of a Word document.

name: mcp:word.get_paragraph_text_from_document
description: Get text from a specific paragraph in a Word document.

name: mcp:word.highlight_table_header
description: Apply special highlighting to table header row.

name: mcp:word.insert_header_near_text
description: Insert a header (with specified style) before or after the target paragraph. Specify by text or paragraph index. Args: filename (str), target_text (str, optional), header_title (str), position ('before' or 'after'), header_style (str, default 'Heading 1'), target_paragraph_index (int, optional).

name: mcp:word.insert_line_or_paragraph_near_text
description: Insert a new line or paragraph (with specified or matched style) before or after the target paragraph. Specify by text or paragraph index. Args: filename (str), target_text (str, optional), line_text (str), position ('before' or 'after'), line_style (str, optional), target_paragraph_index (int, optional).

name: mcp:word.insert_numbered_list_near_text
description: Insert a bulleted or numbered list before or after the target paragraph. Specify by text or paragraph index. Args: filename (str), target_text (str, optional), list_items (list of str), position ('before' or 'after'), target_paragraph_index (int, optional), bullet_type ('bullet' for bullets or 'number' for numbered lists, default: 'bullet').

name: mcp:word.list_available_documents
description: List all .docx files in the specified directory.

name: mcp:word.merge_table_cells
description: Merge cells in a rectangular area of a table.

name: mcp:word.merge_table_cells_horizontal
description: Merge cells horizontally in a single row.

name: mcp:word.merge_table_cells_vertical
description: Merge cells vertically in a single column.

name: mcp:word.protect_document
description: Add password protection to a Word document.

name: mcp:word.replace_block_between_manual_anchors
description: Replace all content between start_anchor_text and end_anchor_text (or next logical header if not provided).

name: mcp:word.replace_paragraph_block_below_header
description: Reemplaza el bloque de párrafos debajo de un encabezado, evitando modificar TOC.

name: mcp:word.search_and_replace
description: Search for text and replace all occurrences.

name: mcp:word.set_table_alignment_all
description: Set text alignment for all cells in a table.

name: mcp:word.set_table_cell_alignment
description: Set text alignment for a specific table cell.

name: mcp:word.set_table_cell_padding
description: Set padding/margins for a specific table cell.

name: mcp:word.set_table_cell_shading
description: Apply shading/filling to a specific table cell.

name: mcp:word.set_table_column_width
description: Set the width of a specific table column.

name: mcp:word.set_table_column_widths
description: Set the widths of multiple table columns.

name: mcp:word.set_table_width
description: Set the overall width of a table.

name: mcp:word.unprotect_document
description: Remove password protection from a Word document.

name: mcp:word.validate_document_footnotes
description: Validate all footnotes in document for coherence and compliance.

name: mcp:yahoo-finance.get_financial_statement
description: Get financial statement for a given ticker symbol

name: mcp:yahoo-finance.get_historical_stock_prices
description: Get historical stock prices for a given ticker symbol

name: mcp:yahoo-finance.get_holder_info
description: Get holder information for a given ticker symbol

name: mcp:yahoo-finance.get_option_chain
description: Fetch the option chain for a given ticker symbol, expiration date, and option type.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol of the stock

parameters.name: expiration_date
parameters.description: The expiration date for the options chain (format: 'YYYY-MM-DD')

parameters.name: option_type
parameters.description: The type of option to fetch ('calls' or 'puts')

name: mcp:yahoo-finance.get_option_expiration_dates
description: Fetch the available options expiration dates for a given ticker symbol.

name: mcp:yahoo-finance.get_recommendations
description: Get recommendations or upgrades/downgrades for a given ticker symbol

name: mcp:yahoo-finance.get_stock_actions
description: Get stock dividends and stock splits for a given ticker symbol

name: mcp:yahoo-finance.get_stock_info
description: Get stock information for a given ticker symbol

name: mcp:yahoo-finance.get_stock_price_by_date
description: Get stock price for a specific date

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol of the stock

parameters.name: find_nearest
parameters.description: Whether to find nearest trading day if exact date has no data

parameters.name: auto_adjust
parameters.description: If True, returns adjusted prices; if False, returns raw prices

name: mcp:yahoo-finance.get_yahoo_finance_news
description: Get news for a given ticker symbol

name: mcp:youtube-transcript.get_timed_transcript
description: Retrieves the transcript of a YouTube video with timestamps.

name: mcp:youtube-transcript.get_transcript
description: Retrieves the transcript of a YouTube video.

name: mcp:youtube-transcript.get_video_info
description: Retrieves the video information.

name: mcp:youtube.channels_getChannel
description: Get information about a YouTube channel

name: mcp:youtube.channels_listVideos
description: Start a new channel videos list with sorting options (creates a new list session)

name: mcp:youtube.channels_navigateList
description: Navigate within an existing list session (prev/next page, jump to specific page)

name: mcp:youtube.playlists_getPlaylist
description: Get information about a YouTube playlist

name: mcp:youtube.playlists_getPlaylistItems
description: Get videos in a YouTube playlist

name: mcp:youtube.playlists_searchPlaylists
description: Search for playlists on YouTube

name: mcp:youtube.transcripts_getTranscript
description: Get the transcript of a YouTube video

name: mcp:youtube.videos_getVideo
description: Get detailed information about a YouTube video

name: mcp:youtube.videos_searchVideos
description: Search for videos on YouTube
